config.welcome_message: Flehew! I'm your ULHS assistant. How can I help you today?
config.fallback_message: I'm sorry, I don't have information on that yet. You can visit our 'Contact Us' page or message us on Facebook for more specific inquiries. Bong sàlamàt!

knowledge_base.response: Enrollment (**Kmasut**) is open for JHS and SHS! You can apply online or visit our campus. Check our 'Enrollment' page for the checklist of requirements like SF9 and Birth Certificate.
Basic requirements include your SF9 (Report Card), PSA Birth Certificate, and a 2x2 ID photo. For SHS, additional documents may be needed depending on the track.
We are tracking various scholarships including DOST-SEI, CHED Tulong Dunong, Tertiary Schools, and GSC City Scholarships. Visit the 'Career & College Portal' for more details!
We offer Academic and Tech-Pro pathways in Grade 11, and HUMSS and TVL-FCS in Grade 12. Our curriculum integrates Blaan cultural heritage.
Upper Labay High School is located at Purok 1, Brgy. Upper Labay, General Santos City, 9500.
You can reach us through our Facebook page (ULHS Official) or visit our 'Contact Us' page for more details.
We are proud of our Blaan heritage! We teach traditional beadwork and jewelry craftsmanship through our School of Living Traditions (SLT).
You can view our updated academic calendar and school events on the 'Calendar' page.
Our Student Life Gallery showcases the vibrant activities, sports, and daily experiences of our students. Check it out to see our campus in action!
Learn common Blaan terms like 'Flehew' (Welcome) and 'Bong sàlamàt' (Thank you) in our Mini-Dictionary page under the Community section.
Our Career & College Portal provides university application timelines, scholarship databases, and alumni success stories for Grade 11-12 students.
Would you like to speak with one of our teachers or staff? They can help with specific concerns. **Which department are you interested in?**
